_description: Svādhiṣṭhāna — Self-Established Coordination. Every agent reads this before touching any file. Every agent updates it when they start, progress, and finish work. The layers (Manas/Buddhi/Mahat/Purusa/Brahman) are the coordination boundaries. Agents at different layers never conflict because they touch different parts of the same files.

_granthi_stages.brahma: declare — intent is visible, no code written yet
_granthi_stages.vishnu: publish — code pushed to branch, visible for review
_granthi_stages.rudra: merge — verified, merged to main, work complete

_layers.manas: Retrieval, search, indexing — surfaces facts from the corpus. Touches: indexer/, search.py, query_processor embedding logic
_layers.buddhi: Synthesis, reasoning, prompt architecture — discriminates and resolves. Touches: buddhi.py, UNIFIED_SYSTEM prompt, main.py synthesis block
_layers.mahat: Graph, relationships, RAM keys — structural intelligence. Touches: graph_memory.py, recall.py, guruji_ram.json, graph_manifest.json
_layers.purusa: Query understanding, intent, lens detection — the witnessing attention. Touches: query_processor.py expansion logic, build_seeker_context()
_layers.brahman: The corpus itself, training data, embeddings — the ground. Touches: data/chunks/, embeddings, raw texts
